name: Arjun Sharma
bio: Arjun has 8+ years of strategy consulting experience and has mentored 300+ MBA students through summer placements. Specialises in market entry, restructuring, and M&A cases.

name: Priya Nair
bio: Priya specialises in case interview prep and has helped students crack top consulting firms across 4 MBA cohorts. Expert in structured problem-solving and MECE thinking.

name: Rohan Mehta
bio: Rohan brings deep finance expertise and has guided 200+ students into top BFSI placements. Covers valuation, DCF modeling, and investment banking interview prep.

name: Sneha Kapoor
bio: Sneha is an ex-FMCG brand manager turned tech PM who coaches students on product and general management roles. Expert in product sense, metrics, and behavioural interviews.

name: Vikram Joshi
bio: Vikram leads marketing at HUL and has trained 150+ students on brand management, consumer insights, and FMCG strategy. Covers 4P interviews and go-to-market frameworks.
